QueryBody: SELECT CASE     WHEN CAST(ISNULL(NULLIF('$[$38.U_SLD_T_BeDis.NUMBER]',''),'0') AS numeric(19,6)) = 0 THEN 0    ELSE         CAST(ISNULL(NULLIF('$[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Sum.NUMBER]',''),'0') AS numeric(19,6))        / NULLIF(CAST(ISNULL(NULLIF('$[$38.U_SLD_T_BeDis.NUMBER]',''),'0') AS numeric(19,6)), 0)        * 100END
